title: Cotranscriptional RNA chemical probing data for the Bacillus subtilis gcvT glycine riboswitch
author: Teh, Serena
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: High-throughput cotranscriptional RNA structure probing data collected for the  Bacillus subtilis   gcvT  glycine riboswitch using variable length Transcription Elongation Complex RNA structure probing (TECprobe-VL).
